title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.364 - John Oliver Jr. Parkway designated for a portion of Missouri Route 74/34 in Cape Girardeau County
text:
227.364.  John Oliver Jr. Parkway designated for a portion of Missouri Route 74/34 in Cape Girardeau County. — The portion of Missouri Route 74/34 contained in Cape Girardeau County, from the Missouri/Illinois state line west to the intersection of Business Loop 55/U.S. 61/Missouri  Route 34, shall be designated as the "John Oliver Jr. Parkway".  The provisions of section 227.299 regarding highway designations shall not be applicable to the provisions of this section.
(L. 2007 H.B. 56)
